action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline eval gives mae_60min=4.128 with only 5 epochs. Loss still declining steeply. Analysis: Model is undertrained. With ~12s/epoch, 150 epochs = ~30min which is feasible. I should also increase model capacity for better performance. Decision: Train for 150 epochs with larger model (residual_channels=64, dilation_channels=64, skip_channels=256, end_channels=512, blocks=4, layers=2). This should significantly reduce mae_60min.
